subject: docs: address audit findings — TutorialModal, guides, codebase docs, TODO
body:
Fix 5 documentation gaps found during CLAUDE.md compliance audit:

- TutorialModal: Add dark mode mention to step 7 (tips section)
- TESTING_GUIDE.md: Add Dark/Light Mode test scenario section (7 cases)
- USER_GUIDE.md: Add Dark/Light Mode section with plain-language guide
- CODEBASE_DOCUMENTATION.md: Add Theming section (dual-layer approach,
  hooks, localStorage keys, flash prevention, Cytoscape awareness)
- TODO.md: Add tech debt entries (flash prevention sync fragility,
  theme picker UI deferred, queryParser.ts 536 lines)
